title: Habenaria praealta

The genus Habenaria is a group of terrestrial orchids found in tropical and subtropical regions. These plants are known to have a unique combination of morphological characteristics. intro: Habenaria praealta, also known as the yellow beard orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Habenaria praealta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
